Package com.bonitasoft.engine.bpm.delegation

Class DelegationRuleUpdater

java.lang.Object
com.bonitasoft.engine.bpm.delegation.DelegationRuleUpdater
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class DelegationRuleUpdater extends Object implements Serializable
Helper for partially updating a DelegationRule through DelegationAPI.updateDelegation(long, DelegationRuleUpdater).

All fields are optional. Only the fields explicitly set on this updater are modified on the target rule; fields left unset are preserved.

delegatorId is intentionally not updatable: a rule is bound to its delegator for its lifetime. To move a delegation to a different delegator, delete this rule and create a new one via DelegationAPI.createOrUpdateDelegation(com.bonitasoft.engine.bpm.delegation.DelegationRuleCreator).

Fluent setters return the updater instance to support chaining: 



 DelegationRule rule = api.updateDelegation(ruleId,
         new DelegationRuleUpdater()
                 .setEndDate(extendedEnd)
                 .setProcesses(newWhitelist));
See Also:

  • Method Details

    • setDelegateId

      public DelegationRuleUpdater setDelegateId(long delegateId)
      Parameters:
      delegateId - the Id of the new delegate user
      Returns:
      this updater for chaining

    • setStartDate

      public DelegationRuleUpdater setStartDate(long startDate)
      Parameters:
      startDate - the new delegation period start (epoch millis), inclusive
      Returns:
      this updater for chaining

    • setEndDate

      public DelegationRuleUpdater setEndDate(long endDate)
      Parameters:
      endDate - the new delegation period end (epoch millis), inclusive
      Returns:
      this updater for chaining

    • setProcesses

      public DelegationRuleUpdater setProcesses(List<String> processes)
      Records a replacement process whitelist for the rule. A rule must carry at least one process entry — this is not a "clear the whitelist" operation; deactivation is performed by deleting the rule.
      Parameters:
      processes - the new process whitelist (process names, at least one entry)
      Returns:
      this updater for chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if processes is null or empty

    • getFields

      public Map<DelegationRuleUpdater.Field,Serializable> getFields()
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable view of the fields supplied to this updater, keyed by DelegationRuleUpdater.Field

    • hasFields

      public boolean hasFields()
      Returns:
      true when at least one field has been set on this updater
